header.name: Harsh Gupta
header.subtitle: ML / AGENTIC AI BUILDER • IIT GANDHINAGAR

profile.overviewText: AI/ML Engineer with 3 years of FinTech production experience — including a payment system handling 1M+ transactions/day under NPCI at 99.99% uptime. Now at IIT Gandhinagar building agentic AI systems that ship.

about.title: About
paragraphs: Three years ago, I was shipping payment systems that processed millions of transactions. Today, I'm building the AI layer that will power the next generation of them.

I made the leap from Software Engineering to AI/ML not because it was trendy, but because I kept hitting the ceiling of what rule-based systems could do. Now at IIT Gandhinagar's PGD-AI/ML program, I'm filling in the foundations while staying firmly hands-on — agentic pipelines, LLM applications, and backend systems that tie it all together.
What makes me different from most AI engineers: I understand production. I know what it means to build for scale, handle real transactions, and own outcomes — not just experiments.
500+ LeetCode problems isn't a flex. It's just how I stay sharp. I'm a problem-solver at core — give me an ambiguous challenge and I'll find the cleanest path through it.
When I'm not building: I'm teaching what I know (LinkedIn, conversations, wherever), trekking when the mountains call, and reading — a habit I owe entirely to IIT's library.

items.title: Project 1
items.description: LLM workflow automation for customer support.

goalChallenge: Set up a repeatable project workspace for cross-functional collaboration.
Reduce handoff delays and improve visibility for stakeholders.
whatIDid: Created project templates for weekly planning and sprint tracking.
Defined team task states and review checkpoints.
outcomeImpact: Improved task clarity and ownership across the team.
Reduced follow-up meetings with better written updates.

goalChallenge: Organize experimentation data and benchmark runs in one place.
Make progress and blockers visible to mentors.
whatIDid: Built structured tracking sheets for datasets and model iterations.
Automated status summaries for weekly reviews.
outcomeImpact: Faster decision making during iteration cycles.
Better traceability of model performance changes.

items.title: Project 3
items.description: AI design assistant for rapid web prototyping.

goalChallenge: Accelerate visual ideation for early product concepts.
Keep design output consistent with brand guidelines.
whatIDid: Created reusable design blocks and prompt-to-design workflows.
Collaborated with developers to validate practical UI outputs.
outcomeImpact: Reduced mockup turnaround time for feature proposals.

goalChallenge: Present outcomes clearly across technical and non-technical audiences.
Make reports concise while preserving technical depth.
whatIDid: Prepared narrative-driven video and written summaries.
Synthesized insights into clear metrics and recommendations.
outcomeImpact: Higher engagement with project updates and demos.
Improved stakeholder confidence in delivery progress.

items.company: National e-Governance Division (NeGD), MeitY — Govt. of India
highlights: Reduced data entry time from 3-4 hrs to seconds
Accelerated client communication from 3-4 days to same-day
Built dynamic real-time update system replacing manual workflows

detail.utilizedTool: Python, React.js, SQL, REST APIs, Data Pipeline Tools
goalChallenge: Large-scale infrastructure budget data managed via slow manual processes across ministries and states
Change propagation to stakeholders took 3-4 days causing delays in critical government operations
whatIDid: Designed and developed internal dynamic dashboard for Ministry budget allocation and infrastructure management
Re-engineered data entry workflow from fully manual to one-click dynamic update system
Built real-time data sync so stakeholder reports updated instantly on system changes
outcomeImpact: Reduced data entry time from 3-4 hours to fraction of seconds — 99.9% efficiency gain
Compressed client communication lag from 3-4 days to same-day
Eliminated manual errors from high-volume budget entries across multiple ministries and states

items.company: Plutos ONE (FinTech Startup) — BBPS / NPCI Integration
highlights: Improved transaction success rate from 80% to 99.99%
Designed Hold-N-Post fault-tolerance system for unreliable biller APIs
Auto-scaling queue architecture cut pods from 6-7 to 2 at peak load

detail.utilizedTool: Java, Spring WebFlux (Reactive), Kafka, Kubernetes, REST APIs, Microservices
goalChallenge: Building BBPS under NPCI processing 1M+ bill payments/day via UPI apps (GPay, PhonePe) for major national billers
20% of valid transactions incorrectly rejected at launch due to biller API latency violating NPCI SLA time windows
Startup resource constraints required efficient auto-scaling under unpredictable peak loads
whatIDid: Solely owned transaction middleware layer between NPCI and downstream billers — most critical pipeline component
Designed Hold-N-Post fault-tolerance pattern: immediately ACK-ing NPCI within SLA window then asynchronously retrying biller APIs at configurable intervals
Architected round-robin dynamic queue system with auto-scaling based on real-time load metrics
Reduced active pod count from 6-7 at peak to 2 pods while sustaining full throughput
outcomeImpact: Drove transaction success rate from 80% to 99.99% on a 1M+ transactions/day system
Auto-scaling architecture sustained peak load on 2 pods vs prior 6-7 — approx 70% infrastructure cost reduction
Zero-downtime resilience for state electricity boards and national billers across India

highlights: Built RESTful APIs for e-commerce and construction management platforms
Delivered end-to-end portal solutions across two industry verticals
Developed backend services for antique marketplace app

goalChallenge: Build reliable API infrastructure and portals for clients in antique e-commerce and construction project management
Required translating distinct business domains into scalable backend architecture
whatIDid: Designed RESTful APIs for antique marketplace mobile app handling product listings, search, and transaction flows
Built full construction work management portal for project tracking, resource allocation, and progress reporting
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to gather requirements and ship production-ready features
outcomeImpact: Delivered two client-facing products across different industry verticals in first year of professional experience
Established strong API design and backend fundamentals that carried into high-scale FinTech work at Plutos ONE
